title: Hogar
overview: At the age of 13, Jano is hit by a car, remains in a coma for 2 weeks and loses his memory. 18 years later, he begins to dig through family memories and the testimonies of his parents, in an attempt to reconstruct his past and find who he is. Home portrays this search over the course of 12 years.
